title: Musa b. 'Abdallah's) Going to al-Tirmidh [and His Activities] until He Was Killed There
description: Musa b. 'Abdallah's) Going to al-Tirmidh [and His Activities] until He Was Killed There. Recorded under the year 85 AH (704–705 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 23.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 23
